content.text: {"title":"User rolls back release","slug":"user-rolls-back-release","intent":"A release operator needs to recover from a bad deployment.","story":"The user runs the rollback command.","expected_behavior":"The CLI reverts to a prior release and reports the result.","boundaries":"This story does not cover initial deployment.","auditable_claims":["The rollback command is user-facing."],"evidence":{"tests":[],"surface":["cli: rollback"],"docs":[]}}
